title: It's bright
body:
Always walking around with a torch so you can see something in the dark? Forget it, because this resourcepack will get rid of this problem once and for all. Now it will be always and everywhere light

![f](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5bd26b173083881d3043315b91d52d54a6867b8.png)

![g](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1603748fa4552d2bcbe5ba43e92d2dcddfd0582.png)
